RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Mr. Lockwood apprises the Court the parties have agreed to retired San Francisco Judge James L. Warren as the referee and that a proposed order has been lodged with the court. Mr. Roy agrees. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MERA HOLLYWOOD, LLC'S Motion (1) To Compel Appointment Of General Judicial Referee Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 638 And (2) To Stay All Proceedings.

The Court appoints the Hon. James L. Warren (ret.) as judicial referee.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for full details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

RULINGG - ARGUED. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views re: selection of an arbitrator or judicial referee. Both sides argue the parameters of the drafter agreement. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MERA HOLLYWOOD, LLC'S Motion (1) To Compel Appointment Of General Judicial Referee Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 638 And (2) To Stay All Proceedings.

Continued to April 6 at 9:30am for further hearing. Both sides to meet and confer. Each party to provide a revised (2nd) list to the Court which include 3 names of former San Francisco Judges by 3/24/23. Revised list to be filed/served on opposing counsel by 3/24/23.
